sonnet_review.biasedText: President Donald Trump and his inner circle have claimed that Robinson was radicalized by left-wing extremists. Prosecutors allege Robinson targeted Kirk for his 'political expression,' but there is no publicly known videotaped statement or lengthy missive to better understand the high-profile killing.
sonnet_review.reason: This text does not appear anywhere in the provided article. The article is about H1-B visa scrutiny and tech workers, not about any person named Robinson or Kirk. The model appears to have fabricated or confused content from an entirely different article.

sonnet_review.biasedText: Kirk amassed a huge following for his brand of Christian conservatism by creating viral moments as he debated college students across the country. Millions viewed his made-for-TikTok takes on topics including race, abortion and LGBTQ+ rights. He was credited with building a youth GOP movement that helped elect Trump last year. He was also accused of bigotry and bullying by some students and civil rights groups.

sonnet_false_negatives.reason: The phrase 'ratchet up that pressure' is the author's interpretive framing that portrays the administration's immigration policy action in an escalatory, coercive manner rather than using neutral language.
The headline uses the aggressive verb 'targets' and places 'censorship' in scare quotes, implying the author questions whether this is truly censorship, adding interpretive spin.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Trump has sought to discourage social media companies from taking down posts they deem hateful or misleading
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Framing the moderated content as posts companies 'deem hateful or misleading' is a subtle editorial judgment that frames the content moderation side sympathetically.
